chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1351 of 2022 Const. Petition No.D-1444 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 443/2023 17-01-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioners in both matters. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocates for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr.Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Irfanul Haq, Divisional Superintendent, Rana Tanveer Shakoor, DAO, Shoukat Hussain Mangi, Divisional Personal Officer and Mir Hassan Brohi, Accounts Officer/Pension, Pakistan Railways Sukkur are present. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-Pakistan Railways and learned DAG submit that Rs.20,00,000/-(Twenty Lac) in lieu of plot/flat/house under the Prime Minister’s Family Assistance Package are to be paid to the retired employees/their legal heirs with the approval of Secretary, Finance Department, Government of Pakistan. They have made relevant correspondence with the Secretary Finance by referring orders passed by this Court, but he is not responding despite being informed about urgency involved in the matter. Hence, they request that Secretary Finance, Government of Pakistan may be issued a notice to appear and explain the position. Let notice be issued to Secretary, Finance Department, Government of Pakistan to appear in person or through his representative to explain as to why orders of this Court have not been complied with regarding payment of Rs.20,00,000/- to the petitioners, as stated above. Adjourned to 27.02.2024. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter.
Adjourned to 27.02.2024. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1460 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 1015/2023 17-01-2024 Mr. Hafeez Bandhani, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocates for respondents No.3 to 5. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Irfanul Haq, Divisional Superintendent, Rana Tanveer Shakoor, DAO, Shoukat Hussain Mangi, Divisional Personal Officer and Mir Hassan Brohi, Accounts Officer/Pension, Pakistan Railways Sukkur are present. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-Pakistan Railways have submitted compliance report along with bank statement of account of petitioner etc., in which amount has been deposited. Hence, listed application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Hence, listed application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-874 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 17-01-2024 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Irfanul Haq, Divisional Superintendent, Rana Tanveer Shakoor, DAO, Shoukat Hussain Mangi, Divisional Personal Officer and Mir Hassan Brohi, Accounts Officer/Pension, Pakistan Railways Sukkur are present. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-Pakistan Railways has submitted compliance report along with bank statement of account of petitioner etc., in which amount has been deposited. Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1359 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions 1.For orders on CMA 5968/2023 2.For hearing of CMA 910/2023 17-01-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocates for respondent No.5. Mr.Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Irfanul Haq, Divisional Superintendent, Rana Tanveer Shakoor, DAO, Shoukat Hussain Mangi, Divisional Personal Officer and Mir Hassan Brohi, Accounts Officer/Pension, Pakistan Railways Sukkur are present. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-Pakistan Railways have submitted compliance report along with bank statement of account of petitioner etc., in which amount has been deposited. Hence, listed applications are accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Hence, listed applications are accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1359 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions 1.For orders on CMA 5968/2023 2.For hearing of CMA 910/2023 22-11-2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocates for respondent No.5. Mr.Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Irfanul Haq, D.S and Rana Tanveer Shakoor, DAO, Pakistan Railways Sukkur are present. ***** Learned counsel for the respondents submits that the order dated 15.12.2022 has been challenged before the Supreme Court. He admits that still stay has not been granted. Officers in attendance submit that this is a financial problem; they have already written letters to the Finance Department, but the requisite amount has not been released. We have already passed a detailed order on 26.10.2023 and need not to repeat the same. In any case, we are adjourning this matter to 17.01.2024 as a last and final chance. If compliance is not made, we will be constrained to pass appropriate orders against the respondents/alleged contemnors in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
